channel.title: AK47.tv
channel.description: AK47.tv (ISSN 1743-6141) is an online art photographic magazine. We showcase images from both fine arts and documentary photographers.
channel.dc:creator: Joerg Diekmann

item.title: AK47.tv - January/February 2006, Ninth Issue
item.description: The Ninth Issue is finally out. Please view it online at AK47.tv
